parameters.name: filter[search]
parameters.description: Search across id, sku, product name, supplier name, sales order number, PO number

parameters.name: filter[status]
parameters.description: Backorder status: pending | released | partial | cancelled

parameters.name: filter[covered_by_po]
parameters.description: true | false — filter by whether the backorder is covered by a PO

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field. Options: id, priority, quantity, created_at, updated_at, backorder_date, backordered_quantity, released_quantity, sku, product_name, supplier, order_date, sales_order_number, eta. Default: priority
